name: loom
description: Loom — a desktop workspace for your Claude Code CLI sessions. Browse, resume, and launch new chats without leaving your flow.

scripts.predev: command -v cargo > /dev/null || (echo 'Loom needs Rust: brew install rust' && exit 1)
scripts.prebuild: command -v cargo > /dev/null || (echo 'Loom needs Rust: brew install rust' && exit 1)
scripts.start: command -v cargo > /dev/null || (echo 'Loom needs Rust: brew install rust' && exit 1) && tauri build --bundles app && open src-tauri/target/release/bundle/macos/Loom.app

author: Nitin Jain
